title: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
summary: While engaged in negotiations over ethics in a crypto market structure bill in Congress, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand said she had “no involvement” in her son’s derivatives exchange, backed by at least one industry figure.

title: IMF says tokenization could transform settlement and financial stability
summary: The global lender says blockchain-based finance could streamline markets but warns that fragmented standards and regulations may create new systemic risks.

title: Oil Steadies as More Supply Flows Through Strait of Hormuz
summary: Oil steadied as tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz increased further, adding to a gush of near-term supply while talks between the US and Iran continue.

title: Carney Keeps North BC Tanker Ban, Signaling Alberta’s Pipeline Will Go South
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced a deal with British Columbia that keeps an oil tanker ban in place for Canada’s north coast, and commits billions of dollars in federal funding for energy, mining and transportation projects.

title: Wavespace Launches MiCA-Compliant Self-Custodial Bitcoin Debit Card Powered by Lightning and NWC

title: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report
summary: Sam Altman is pitching a 5% equity stake in OpenAI for the U.S. government—and reportedly wants every major AI company to do the same.

title: Russia Is Ready for 'Widespread Use' of Digital Ruble by September, Says Bank Governor
summary: Bank of Russia Governor Elvira Nabiullina said major banks and retailers are on track to begin accepting the digital ruble by September 1.

title: Securitize becomes first to debut shares on NYSE and onchain, but it won’t be the last
summary: President Brett Redfearn said the firm is in discussions to tokenize other IPOs "definitely ... within the next year.”

title: eToro leads $12.5 million round in onchain perps exchange Extended
summary: "The partnership will focus on expanding access to global financial markets through next-generation on-chain infrastructure," eToro said.

title: US economy undershoots forecasts with 57,000 jobs added in June
summary: Hiring slows after 3-month streak of overperformance

title: Trump’s $1bn plan to remake America’s capital
summary: The US president calls it a ‘gift’ to the nation. Critics say he is racing past checks to stamp his mark on the capital
